overview: Colorado Hormone Clinic specializes in hormone replacement regimens combined with exercise, diet, and nutritional supplementation. Patients receive a complete physical examination and laboratory evaluation, after which Dr. Lee prescribes a personalized supplementation program and monitors treatment to optimize hormone levels.
highlights: Personal physician care provided by Dr. Lee
Complete physical examination and laboratory evaluation
targetAudience: Adults experiencing age-related symptoms seeking hormone optimization and anti-aging care.
